summary: Frontend testing of TRUCKERS NAV BY TUE app after major update: (1) New HERE API key supporting all tile APIs, (2) HERE logistics.satellite.day hybrid tiles, (3) 55° map tilt for cinematic trucking GPS perspective, (4) Mapbox 2D SAT view with pitch:55, (5) POI clustering with H.clustering.Provider. All 16 requested features verified working.

minor.issue: API key reported as leaked (403 error) - TTS falls back to native browser speech synthesis (non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Guest login (Continue as Guest + skip tutorial) - works correctly
VERIFIED: Navigation view renders with dark-gold satellite hybrid tiles (roads, highways, city labels visible on satellite imagery)
VERIFIED: Map has visible 55° tilt/perspective (not flat 2D, shows tilted perspective view with horizon visible)
VERIFIED: Map panning and zooming works smoothly via H.mapevents.Behavior
VERIFIED: Search bar - typed 'Dallas, TX' and received 3 suggestions from HERE API + 3 nearby POI recommendations
VERIFIED: Route calculation - typed destination + pressed Enter, gold route polyline rendered on satellite map
VERIFIED: Route comparison panel shows 3 routes (PRIMARY: 9h 54m/660.3mi/$357.59, ALT 1: 10h 35m/674.3mi/$365.15, ALT 2: 10h 36m/694.3mi/$376.00)
VERIFIED: MUTCD speed limit sign appears near user marker after routing (SPEED LIMIT 35 visible)
VERIFIED: Turn-by-turn navigation header shows current maneuver instruction ('Continue on S 8th St on W Broadway. Go')
VERIFIED: Truck Restrictions panel shows warnings (TRUCK RESTRICTIONS (1) - ROUTE GOES THROUGH TOLL BOOTH THAT REQUIRES TRANSPONDER)
VERIFIED: Weather widget shows temperature (41°/42° CLOUDY), wind (9 MPH N), visibility (13.5/13.6 MI), and 3-day forecast
VERIFIED: HERE/SAT toggle button in map controls switches between HERE map and Mapbox SAT view
VERIFIED: When SAT view is active, the Mapbox satellite-streets map renders with tilt (pitch:55) and shows '2D SAT' label

VERIFIED: All sidebar tabs clickable (Dashboard, Navigation, Load Board, Truck Stops, Pay Summary, Maintenance, History, Fuel Network, Community, ELD Logs, Offline Maps, Display, Settings, Announcements)
VERIFIED: Display tab - HUD Layout with 22/22 visible toggleable elements, SHOW ALL/HIDE ALL buttons, Trip Panel Position (LEFT/RIGHT), Speed Warning Tolerance (+0 to +10)
VERIFIED: Compass rose shows bearing direction (visible in bottom right corner)
VERIFIED: IOWA state badge appears at bottom center of map
VERIFIED: POI clustering via H.clustering.Provider - console shows 'Cluster Provider: exists' and POIs being clustered

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: App successfully uses HERE Maps JS API v3.1 with new API key (hDGCtu7Z...) supporting logistics.satellite.day tiles. Map tilt is 55° by default (set via getViewModel().setLookAtData({tilt:55})). CSS filter creates dark-gold signature look (.here-map-satellite-dark class). HERE/SAT toggle switches between HERE logistics.satellite.day and Mapbox satellite-streets-v12 (both with tilt). Route calculation returns 3 routes with comparison panel. MUTCD signs, truck restrictions, weather widget all working. POI clustering via H.clustering.Provider. Gemini TTS API key is leaked - app falls back to native TTS. Geolocation fails in headless browser - defaults to Council Bluffs, Iowa. Preview URL: https://hud-customizer-5.preview.emergentagent.com

guest_login.details: Guest login button works, navigates to COMMAND CENTER dashboard, tutorial skip works

satellite_map_dark_gold_theme.details: HERE logistics.satellite.day tiles load with dark-gold CSS filter applied via .here-map-satellite-dark class

map_tilt_perspective.details: Map has visible 55° tilt/perspective - not flat 2D, shows tilted view with horizon visible at top

map_panning_zooming.details: Map supports drag to pan and scroll to zoom via H.mapevents.Behavior

search_bar.details: Search bar accepts text, shows suggestions from HERE API, 'Dallas, TX' search returns 3 suggestions + 3 nearby POIs

route_calculation.details: Route calculated from Council Bluffs, Iowa to Dallas, TX - gold route polyline rendered on satellite map

route_comparison_panel.details: Shows PRIMARY + 2 alternates with duration, distance, fuel cost ($357.59, $365.15, $376.00)

mutcd_speed_limit_signs.details: SPEED LIMIT 35 sign visible near user marker after routing

turn_by_turn_navigation.details: Navigation header shows 'Continue on S 8th St on W Broadway. Go'

truck_restrictions_alert.details: TRUCK RESTRICTIONS (1) panel shows 'ROUTE GOES THROUGH TOLL BOOTH THAT REQUIRES TRANSPONDER'

weather_widget.details: Shows 41°/42° CLOUDY, 9 MPH N wind, 13.5/13.6 MI visibility, 3-day forecast

here_sat_toggle.details: HERE/SAT toggle button switches between HERE map (logistics.satellite.day) and Mapbox SAT view (satellite-streets-v12)

mapbox_sat_view_with_tilt.details: Mapbox satellite-streets map renders with pitch:55 tilt, shows '2D SAT' label in bottom right

sidebar_tabs.details: All 14 sidebar tabs clickable: Dashboard, Navigation, Load Board, Truck Stops, Pay Summary, Maintenance, History, Fuel Network, Community, ELD Logs, Offline Maps, Display, Settings, Announcements

display_hud_layout.details: Display Layout tab shows live preview, 22/22 visible elements, SHOW ALL/HIDE ALL, Trip Panel Position (LEFT/RIGHT), Speed Warning Tolerance (+0 to +10), Navigation section with Turn Instructions, Lane Guidance, Speed Display, Arrival Bar, Maneuver Preview

compass_rose.details: Compass rose visible in bottom right corner showing bearing direction

poi_clustering.details: H.clustering.Provider initialized - console shows 'Cluster Provider: exists' and POIs being clustered

known_issues.gemini_api_key: Gemini API key reported as leaked (403 error) - TTS falls back to native browser speech synthesis. Non-blocking.
known_issues.geolocation: Geolocation fails in headless browser - defaults to Council Bluffs, Iowa via IP geolocation fallback. Expected behavior.

mocked_apis.none: No mocked APIs - all integrations are live (HERE Maps, Mapbox, etc.)
